en.extract:
The Rossel cicadabird (Edolisoma rostratum) is a species of bird in the family Campephagidae that is endemic to Rossel Island in Papua New Guinea. It was recently reclassified from a subspecies of the slender-billed cicadabird to its own individual species.

The '''Rossel cicadabird''' ('''''Edolisoma rostratum''''') is a [[species]] of bird in the family [[Campephagidae]] that is endemic to [[Rossel Island]] in [[Papua New Guinea]]. It was recently reclassified from a [[subspecies]] of the [[slender-billed cicadabird]] to its own individual species. <ref name="Birdlife">{{cite web |author=BirdLife International |title=''Edolisoma rostratum'' |url=http://datazone.birdlife.org/species/factsheet/rossel-cicadabird-edolisoma-rostratum |access-date=13 March 2023}}</ref>
